rationale: ADR-022 (567 lines) covers all ACs: evaluates Proposals A/B/C and picks A, full /api/workers/ contract for all 6 endpoints, mermaid diagrams for register/claim/restart/death/shutdown, compatibility analysis, --local in-process collapse, sequencing vs ddx-29058e2a/5cb6e6cd/dc157075, ordered roadmap, FEAT-006 amended.

findings.summary: ADR filed at docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-022-... rather than the AC-specified docs/helix/03-decide/ path; the ADR explicitly documents this deviation, noting 02-design/adr is the actual HELIX layout used in this repo and ADR-022 is the next number after ADR-021.
AC #10 (user review/approval before filing implementation beads) is a process gate; ADR status is 'Proposed' which correctly defers bead filing pending this review.
